mapper.select:
/* PRDCTN_STTUS_Dao_retrievePrdctnSttusSetcscByList */
SELECT /*+ LEADING(YEAR_DATA MONTH_DATA) */ MONTH_DATA.cmmn_cd AS cmmn_cd, MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cls_cd AS setcsc_cd, MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cls_nm AS setcsc_nm, MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty AS eqp_cpcty, MONTH_DATA.mt_elyrs_qy_plan AS mly_elyrs_qy_plan, MONTH_DATA.mt_elyrs_qy_acmslt AS mly_elyrs_qy_acmslt, MONTH_DATA.mt_elyrs_qy_acmtrt AS mly_elyrs_qy_acmtrt, ROUND(CASE WHEN MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * MONTH_DATA.dcnt IS NOT NULL AND MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * MONTH_DATA.dcnt != 0 THEN NVL(MONTH_DATA.mt_elyrs_qy_acmslt, 0) / (MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * MONTH_DATA.dcnt) ELSE NULL END * 100, 1) AS mly_eqp_utlz_rt, YEAR_DATA.yy_elyrs_qy_plan AS fyer_elyrs_qy_plan, YEAR_DATA.yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt AS fyer_elyrs_qy_acmslt, YEAR_DATA.yy_elyrs_qy_acmtrt AS fyer_elyrs_qy_acmtrt, YEAR_DATA.elyrs_ern_acmslt AS fyer_ern, ROUND(CASE WHEN MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * YEAR_DATA.dcnt IS NOT NULL AND MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * YEAR_DATA.dcnt != 0 THEN NVL(YEAR_DATA.yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt, 0) / (MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * YEAR_DATA.dcnt) ELSE NULL END * 100, 1) AS fyer_eqp_utlz_rt, ( SELECT sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1001' AND cmmn_cd = MONTH_DATA.cmmn_cd ) AS ecs_ordr FROM ( SELECT mt, MAX(cmmn_cd) AS cmmn_cd, elcpwstn_cls_cd, MAX(elcpwstn_cls_nm) AS elcpwstn_cls_nm, ROUND(SUM(elcpwstn_cpcty), 0) AS elcpwstn_cpcty, SUM(s2) / 1000 AS mt_elyrs_qy_plan, SUM(r2) / 1000 AS mt_elyrs_qy_acmslt, CASE WHEN SUM(r2) > 0 AND SUM(s2) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(r2) / SUM(s2) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS mt_elyrs_qy_acmtrt, MAX(dcnt) AS dcnt, MIN(hq_cd_dsply_ordr) AS hq_cd_dsply_ordr, MIN(dsply_ordr) AS dsply_ordr FROM MONTH_DATA_LIST WHERE mt = SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) GROUP BY mt, elcpwstn_cls_cd ) MONTH_DATA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4) AS mt, elcpwstn_cls_cd, MAX(elcpwstn_cls_nm) AS elcpwstn_cls_nm, SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_plan) / 1000 AS yy_elyrs_qy_plan, SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt) / 1000 AS yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt, CASE WHEN SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt) > 0 AND SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_plan) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt) / SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_plan) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS yy_elyrs_qy_acmtrt, ROUND(SUM(elyrs_ern_acmslt), 0) AS elyrs_ern_acmslt, /* 원 => 원 */ MAX(dcnt) AS dcnt, MIN(hq_cd_dsply_ordr) AS hq_cd_dsply_ordr, MIN(dsply_ordr) AS dsply_ordr FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4) AS mt, elcpwstn_cls_cd, MAX(elcpwstn_cls_nm) AS elcpwstn_cls_nm, SUM(s2) AS yy_elyrs_qy_plan, SUM(r2) AS yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt, SUM(r3) AS elyrs_ern_acmslt, SUM(dcnt) AS dcnt, MIN(hq_cd_dsply_ordr) AS hq_cd_dsply_ordr, MIN(dsply_ordr) AS dsply_ordr FROM MONTH_DATA_LIST GROUP BY SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4), elcpwstn_cls_cd, elcpwstn_cd ) GROUP BY SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4), elcpwstn_cls_cd ) YEAR_DATA ON MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cls_cd = YEAR_DATA.elcpwstn_cls_cd ORDER BY ecs_ordr

/* PRDCTN_STTUS_Dao_retrievePrdctnSttusSetcscByChartList */
SELECT MAX(elcpwstn_cls_nm) AS setcsc_nm, MAX(elcpwstn_nm) AS elcpwstn_nm, SUM(s2) / 1000 AS elyrs_qy_plan, SUM(r2) / 1000 AS elyrs_qy_acmslt, CASE WHEN SUM(r2) > 0 AND SUM(s2) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(r2) / SUM(s2) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS elyrs_qy_acmtrt FROM MONTH_DATA_LIST WHERE 1 = 1
AND mt = SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6)
GROUP BY
mt,
SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4),
elcpwstn_cls_cd, elcpwstn_cd ORDER BY MIN(hq_cd_dsply_ordr), MIN(elcpwstn_cls_cd), MIN(dsply_ordr),
mt
SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4)

/* PRDCTN_STTUS_Dao_retrievePrdctnSttusDeptByList */
SELECT /*+ LEADING(YEAR_DATA MONTH_DATA) */ MONTH_DATA.cstct_vu AS dept_cd, MONTH_DATA.cstct_nm AS dept_nm, MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty AS eqp_cpcty, MONTH_DATA.mt_elyrs_qy_plan AS mly_elyrs_qy_plan, MONTH_DATA.mt_elyrs_qy_acmslt AS mly_elyrs_qy_acmslt, MONTH_DATA.mt_elyrs_qy_acmtrt AS mly_elyrs_qy_acmtrt, ROUND(CASE WHEN MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * MONTH_DATA.dcnt IS NOT NULL AND MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * MONTH_DATA.dcnt != 0 THEN NVL(MONTH_DATA.mt_elyrs_qy_acmslt, 0) / (MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * MONTH_DATA.dcnt) ELSE NULL END * 100, 1) AS mly_eqp_utlz_rt, YEAR_DATA.yy_elyrs_qy_plan AS fyer_elyrs_qy_plan, YEAR_DATA.yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt AS fyer_elyrs_qy_acmslt, YEAR_DATA.yy_elyrs_qy_acmtrt AS fyer_elyrs_qy_acmtrt, ROUND(CASE WHEN MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * YEAR_DATA.dcnt IS NOT NULL AND MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * YEAR_DATA.dcnt != 0 THEN NVL(YEAR_DATA.yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt, 0) / (MONTH_DATA.elcpwstn_cpcty * 24 * YEAR_DATA.dcnt) ELSE NULL END * 100, 1) AS fyer_eqp_utlz_rt, YEAR_DATA.elyrs_ern_acmslt AS fyer_ern FROM ( SELECT mt, cstct_vu, MAX(cstct_nm) AS cstct_nm, ROUND(SUM(elcpwstn_cpcty), 0) AS elcpwstn_cpcty, SUM(s2) / 1000 AS mt_elyrs_qy_plan, SUM(r2) / 1000 AS mt_elyrs_qy_acmslt, CASE WHEN SUM(r2) > 0 AND SUM(s2) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(r2) / SUM(s2) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS mt_elyrs_qy_acmtrt, MAX(dcnt) AS dcnt, MIN(hq_cd_dsply_ordr) AS hq_cd_dsply_ordr, MIN(dsply_ordr) AS dsply_ordr FROM MONTH_DATA_LIST WHERE 1 = 1 AND mt = SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) GROUP BY mt, cstct_vu ) MONTH_DATA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cstct_vu, MAX(cstct_nm) AS cstct_nm, SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_plan) / 1000 AS yy_elyrs_qy_plan, SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt) / 1000 AS yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt, CASE WHEN SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt) > 0 AND SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_plan) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt) / SUM(yy_elyrs_qy_plan) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS yy_elyrs_qy_acmtrt, ROUND(SUM(elyrs_ern_acmslt), 0) AS elyrs_ern_acmslt, /* 원 => 원 */ MAX(dcnt) AS dcnt, MIN(hq_cd_dsply_ordr) AS hq_cd_dsply_ordr, MIN(dsply_ordr) AS dsply_ordr FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4) AS mt, cstct_vu, MAX(cstct_nm) AS cstct_nm, SUM(s2) AS yy_elyrs_qy_plan, SUM(r2) AS yy_elyrs_qy_acmslt, SUM(r3) AS elyrs_ern_acmslt, SUM(dcnt) AS dcnt, MIN(hq_cd_dsply_ordr) AS hq_cd_dsply_ordr, MIN(dsply_ordr) AS dsply_ordr FROM MONTH_DATA_LIST GROUP BY SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4), cstct_vu, elcpwstn_cd ) WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4), cstct_vu ) YEAR_DATA ON MONTH_DATA.cstct_vu = YEAR_DATA.cstct_vu ORDER BY MONTH_DATA.hq_cd_dsply_ordr, MONTH_DATA.dsply_ordr

/* PRDCTN_STTUS_Dao_retrievePrdctnSttusDeptByChartList */
SELECT MAX(cstct_nm) AS dept_nm, MAX(elcpwstn_nm) AS elcpwstn_nm, SUM(s2) / 1000 AS elyrs_qy_plan, SUM(r2) / 1000 AS elyrs_qy_acmslt, CASE WHEN SUM(r2) > 0 AND SUM(s2) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(r2) / SUM(s2) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS elyrs_qy_acmtrt FROM MONTH_DATA_LIST WHERE 1 = 1
AND mt = SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6)
GROUP BY
mt,
SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4),
elcpwstn_cls_cd, elcpwstn_cd ORDER BY MIN(hq_cd_dsply_ordr), MIN(elcpwstn_cls_cd), MIN(dsply_ordr),
mt
SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4)
